creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
audio/oss is abandonware, see https://sourceforge.net/p/opensound/git/ci/master/log/ (no activity for years outside of compile fixes)

Compare with OS vendors:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/sys/dev/sound/?view=log
https://gitweb.dragonflybsd.org/dragonfly.git/history/HEAD:/sys/dev/sound
https://github.com/illumos/illumos-gate/commits/master/usr/src/uts/common/io/audio
https://github.com/NetBSD/src/commits/trunk/lib/libossaudio
https://github.com/torvalds/linux/commits/master/sound/core/oss
